title: Example feature, prototype-gated
description: Clarified 2026-07-XX; assumptions and Jacob's answers in the campaign brief.

packets.title: Working skeleton, fixture data
packets.objective: Prove the shape end to end so design flaws surface before the full build.
acceptance_criteria: demo command runs the happy path end to end against fixture data

packets.title: Full implementation: core logic
packets.objective: Production-quality build of the approved prototype direction.
acceptance_criteria: core logic handles the documented edge cases, asserted by tests

packets.title: Full implementation: CLI wiring
packets.objective: Expose the feature through the CLI, matching existing command conventions.
acceptance_criteria: ./kitty example-feature run <arg> produces the documented output

packets.title: Full implementation: docs
packets.objective: Document the feature for future authors.
acceptance_criteria: docs/ page describes the feature and links a runnable example
